message:
feat(trace): add CRDT module with GCounter, PNCounter, LWWRegister, ORSet, MVRegister

Introduces convergent replicated data types under trace::distributed::crdt,
providing the building blocks for conflict-free replicated state across
distributed supervision topologies. Includes comprehensive tests for
merge commutativity, associativity, and idempotence for each type.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
